title: Government Contractor NDA
description: Structured for subcontractors working on municipal or federal agency projects, protecting government-controlled unclassified information.
whatsCovered: Federal and municipal bid pricing sheets
Compliance with FAR and DFARS regulations
whenToUse: Use this contract when partner firms or subcontractors are bidding on or executing a government contract and will have access to sensitive agency data or bid rates.

clauses.heading: GOVERNMENT CONTRACTOR NDA
clauses.body: This Unilateral Confidentiality Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {disclosing_party}, located at {disclosing_address} ("Discloser"), and {receiving_party}, located at {receiving_address} ("Recipient").

clauses.heading: 1. Confidential Information
clauses.body: Confidential Information includes all proprietary technical, financial, or business information disclosed by Discloser to Recipient, whether in writing, orally, or visually, including but not limited to trade secrets, blueprints, algorithms, or client rosters.

clauses.heading: 2. Secrecy Obligations
clauses.body: Recipient agrees to hold Discloser's Confidential Information in trust and secrecy. Recipient shall not copy, disclose, or use the information for any purpose other than to evaluate a prospective business relationship with Discloser. This obligation shall survive for {term_years} years from the Effective Date.

clauses.heading: 3. Federal Regulations Compliance
clauses.body: Recipient agrees to handle all proprietary information in strict compliance with the Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) and other applicable agency security guidelines.

clauses.heading: 4. Exclusions
clauses.body: Confidential Information does not include information that: (a) is or becomes publicly available through no breach, (b) was already in Recipient's possession, (c) is independently developed, or (d) is required to be disclosed by law.

clauses.heading: 5. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What is FAR compliance in this NDA?
faq.answer: It refers to the Federal Acquisition Regulation, which mandates strict procedures for subcontractors handling proprietary developer and government information.

faq.question: Is this suitable for classified military information?
faq.answer: No, classified information requires official government clearance agreements (e.g., DD Form 254) rather than a commercial NDA.
